title: Misinformation Surge
description: False narratives spread rapidly across social platforms, risking public harm.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Kai: "Regulating misinformation protects national security. False rumors have triggered violence before." (Source: Harvard Misinformation Review)

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Leo: "Regulation becomes censorship. Free speech must remain intact."

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Kai: "Freedom without responsibility is chaos. Dangerous lies spread faster than truth."

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Leo: "Then educate the public — don't silence them."
